atomicity.message: Staged payload is one land-20 delivery slice: the E2E harness and residual test sweep plus the user-authorized NextSteps/ValidateShape carry-over and the minimal bead_ids query indexing fix exposed by that harness.

conditions.message: The staged Go and documentation slice is mechanically clean and covered by the relevant tests for this E2E/residual harness payload.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly the packet's eight staged paths: cmd/burpvalve/e2e_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/explain_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go, cmd/burpvalve/main.go, docs/attestation-schema.md, internal/attestations/attestations.go, internal/attestations/query.go, internal/backpressure/artifacts.go.
git diff --cached --check exited 0.
Staged gofmt check via git show :path piped through gofmt produced no gofmt differs output for all staged Go files.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'E2E|EndToEnd|Commit|Help|Init' passed: ok burpvalve/cmd/burpvalve 22.375s.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve passed: ok burpvalve/cmd/burpvalve 28.157s.
go test ./internal/attestations ./internal/backpressure passed.
go test ./... completed with exit code 0.

conditions.message: The staged slice centralizes residual artifact/explain shape handling and uses a shared E2E harness rather than copy-paste command setup.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status/stat matched the packet's 8 staged paths: cmd/burpvalve/e2e_test.go added plus explain/help/main/docs/attestations/query/artifacts changes; 1778 insertions, 469 deletions.
sed/rg inspection of cmd/burpvalve/e2e_test.go showed a shared e2eHarness with common run, runInput, git, burpvalve, env, requireExit, artifact, and git-status helpers reused across scenarios.
sed inspection showed ValidateShape is implemented once in internal/attestations/attestations.go and reused by validateExplainArtifact rather than duplicating blocked-artifact validation in main.go.

conditions.message: The payload adds end-to-end checks that make fake readiness harder: hook gating, verifier policy failure, stale payload drift, no-op lint truthfulness, and bead queryability are exercised against real temp repos.
evidence: go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'E2E|EndToEnd|Commit|Help|Init' passed in /tmp/land20-stage.pWGBq4.

rg/sed inspection found E2E assertions for missing attestation blocking a real pre-commit hook, main-agent verifier evidence being rejected under independent_required, stale payload drift blocking, and lint no-op reporting not_enforced rather than pass.
E2E bead tests assert top-level and feature bead_ids are written, coupled bead ids are queryable by --bead, and no-beads paths do not invent bead metadata.

conditions.message: Changed behavior has direct or end-to-end coverage: ValidateShape, blocked next_steps, bead metadata query indexing, explain artifact records, and E2E harness flows are tested.
evidence: cmd/burpvalve/explain_test.go includes TestExplainBlockedReportPathAndVerifierPolicyFailure, TestExplainPassingAttestationPath, and commit/explain JSON tests covering ValidateShape and artifact next_steps behavior.
cmd/burpvalve/e2e_test.go includes TestE2EBeadDeliveryAttestationQueryAndDrift, which verifies coupled bead ids are queryable and blocked reports remain queryable by status and bead.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve and go test ./... both passed in /tmp/land20-stage.pWGBq4.

conditions.message: The staged slice has path/stat agreement, whitespace check, targeted E2E/residual tests, package tests, and full repo tests on a staged-only snapshot.
evidence: git diff --cached --check exited 0 on the staged payload.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'E2E|EndToEnd|Commit|Help|Init' passed in /tmp/land20-stage.pWGBq4.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve passed in /tmp/land20-stage.pWGBq4.
go test ./... passed in /tmp/land20-stage.pWGBq4 across cmd/burpvalve and all internal packages.

conditions.message: The payload changes evidence and traceability surfaces and preserves them in schema, query/explain code, and E2E coverage.
evidence: docs/attestation-schema.md staged diff documents top-level next_steps for blocked reports.
internal/attestations/attestations.go staged diff adds Artifact.NextSteps and ValidateShape(), including blocked-artifact structural validation.
internal/backpressure/artifacts.go staged diff writes blocked reports as attestations.Artifact with report.NextSteps populated before writeArtifact, instead of an outer ad hoc envelope.
internal/attestations/query.go staged diff indexes top-level artifact.BeadIDs and artifact.Feature.BeadIDs while retaining legacy source_bead indexing.

cmd/burpvalve/main.go staged inspection showed explainArtifact now reads artifact.NextSteps, marks missing condition evidence as a blocker, validates artifact shape, and recordFromArtifact carries payload hash, manifest hash, feature ids, and bead ids.

cmd/burpvalve/e2e_test.go includes E2E coverage for attestation_written artifacts, blocked reports, query/list/latest/show, bead metadata, stale drift reports, and explain recovery scenarios. The focused E2E/commit/help/init test command passed.

conditions.message: The staged payload is limited to the land-20 E2E harness, authorized residual NextSteps/ValidateShape work, and the minimal bead_ids query indexing fix exposed by that harness.
evidence: git diff --cached --name-status showed exactly the 8 packet paths and no excluded staged paths.
git diff -- cmd/burpvalve/commit_test.go cmd/burpvalve/help_test.go cmd/burpvalve/init_test.go produced no output in the live repo after staging.

git diff --cached --numstat showed the only non-test source changes are main.go residual explain/help refactor, docs/attestation-schema.md next_steps documentation, internal/attestations ValidateShape/NextSteps fields, query.go bead_ids indexing, and artifacts.go blocked report next_steps serialization.

conditions.message: Destructive or dirty-state behavior is confined to temporary E2E repositories and is asserted explicitly; production code changes do not add new destructive command paths.
evidence: sed inspection of newE2EHarness showed it uses t.TempDir for workDir, builds a temp burpvalve binary, and runs commands inside temp repos with temp HOME/XDG/PATH.
rg/sed inspection found os.Remove only in an E2E temp repo delete/rename scenario and git commit --no-verify only for test baseline/final commits inside harness repos.
E2E helpers assertGitClean, assertNoUnexpectedRootUntracked, and assertGitStatusUnchanged verify that hook/lint/setup scenarios leave expected repository state.

conditions.message: Artifact shape, blocked-report next_steps, payload binding, and bead metadata indexing are preserved and covered by tests.
evidence: internal/attestations/attestations.go adds Artifact.NextSteps and ValidateShape; ValidateShape validates common identity fields and condition common fields for blocked artifacts without requiring passing gate semantics.
internal/attestations/query.go now indexes artifact.BeadIDs and artifact.Feature.BeadIDs before legacy feature.source_bead fallback, fixing coupled bead queryability.
internal/backpressure/artifacts.go stores blockedReportNextSteps directly on the Artifact before pretty JSON write; docs/attestation-schema.md documents blocked report next_steps.
TestE2EBeadDeliveryAttestationQueryAndDrift verifies payload hash binding, single/coupled bead metadata, --bead queries, blocked drift reports, and no-beads metadata absence.

conditions.message: The governed sandbox/command-execution surface in the new E2E harness is isolated to temp HOME/XDG/PATH, disables Git terminal prompts, and does not introduce auth, secret, permission, or external API behavior.
evidence: sed inspection of e2eHarness.env showed HOME, XDG_CONFIG_HOME, XDG_DATA_HOME, PATH, GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0, and NO_COLOR are set per harness run; transcript records only relevant env keys.
rg inspection found no staged auth, secret, token, permission, PII, tenant, network, or external API code changes in the staged payload.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'E2E|EndToEnd|Commit|Help|Init' passed in the staged snapshot with the isolated command harness.

conditions.message: The staged payload has no governed visual surface: no browser UI, rendered image, screenshot, canvas, or layout component is changed. Help/explain text and JSON/human CLI output are exercised as CLI behavior, not visual regression surfaces.
evidence: Staged path list is limited to Go CLI/test files plus docs/attestation-schema.md and internal attestation/backpressure code.
Targeted staged inspection found help/explain output tests, but no image, browser, CSS, canvas, screenshot, or visual asset paths in the payload.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'E2E|EndToEnd|Commit|Help|Init' passed, covering the CLI output behavior that is present.

conditions.message: The added E2E suite is performance-governed; observed staged-snapshot test times stayed bounded and no sleeps or open-ended waits were introduced.
evidence: go test ./cmd/burpvalve -run 'E2E|EndToEnd|Commit|Help|Init' completed successfully in 20.515s in /tmp/land20-stage.pWGBq4.
go test ./cmd/burpvalve completed successfully in 25.649s, and go test ./... completed with cmd/burpvalve at 25.133s plus internal packages under about 2.4s each.
rg for Sleep/time.After/Benchmark/WithTimeout found no sleeps in cmd/burpvalve/e2e_test.go; existing timeout-bearing paths remain context-bound in production/backpressure code.

conditions.message: The payload keeps autonomous flows bounded: E2E scenarios use explicit flags/responses, blocked states preserve next steps, and verifier policy still rejects main-agent evidence where independent review is required.
evidence: E2E tests use explicit --force/--json/--git-init/--responses/--bead flags in temp repos and assert blocked states instead of silently proceeding when evidence is missing or stale.
TestE2ECommitPayloadDeleteRenameAndVerifierPolicy intentionally supplies main-agent verifier provenance and asserts the independent_required policy blocks it.
explain/artifact changes preserve blocked report next_steps so recovery requires explicit verifier evidence or rerun steps rather than autonomous success claims.
